question: How much did Christina Carroll spend on Accounts Receivable (A/R) in July during last year?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(Credit) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID 
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'Christina Carroll' 
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_TYPE = 'A/R' 
AND strftime('%Y-%m', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) = strftime('%Y-%m', date('now', '-1 year')) || '-07';
gold_sql: select sum(debit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where T1.customers = "Christina Carroll" and instr(account,"Accounts Receivable (A/R)") and strftime("%m", transaction_date) = '07' and strftime("%Y", transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', current_date) - 1 and account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense')

question: What acount had our biggest expense This fiscal year?

ORDER BY total_debit DESC

question: Compare sales by customer YTD
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year') AND date(current_date) group by customers

  AND customers.customer_full_name = 'Thomas Middleton'

question: Compare sales by customer This week to date
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS sales_this_week, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) - LAG(SUM(master_txn_table.Credit)) OVER (ORDER BY master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) AS sales_last_week
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'weekday 0', '-7 days') AND date('now', 'weekday 0')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "weekday 0", "-7 days") AND date( current_date)  group by customers

gold_sql: select sum(debit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where T1.customers = "Tommy Beard" and instr(account,"Accounts Receivable (A/R)") and strftime("%m", transaction_date) = '07' and strftime("%Y", transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', current_date) - 1 and account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense')

question: Compare sales by customer in q1 this year
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year', '+1 month') AND date('now', 'start of year', '+3 month')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year') AND date(current_date, 'start of year', '+3 month', '-1 day')  group by customers

question: What acount had our biggest expense This fiscal year?

FROM master_txn_table
WHERE transaction_date BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now')
GROUP BY account
ORDER BY total_debit DESC
LIMIT 1;
gold_sql: select account, sum(debit) from master_txn_table as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name  where account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year', '+3 months') AND date(current_date) group by account order by sum(debit) desc limit 1

question: Compare sales by customer This year to date
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS sales_this_year, 
    SUM(m.Credit) - LAG(SUM(m.Credit)) OVER (ORDER BY c.customer_name) AS sales_last_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    c.customer_name;
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year') AND date(current_date)  group by customers

question: Compare sales by customer Last year
generated_sql: SELECT c.customer_name, SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS last_year_sales, SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_difference FROM master_txn_table m JOIN customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name WHERE m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income') GROUP BY c.customer_name
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date,  'start of year', '-1 days', 'start of year') AND date(current_date,  'start of year', '-1 days')  group by customers

question: How much did Mark Wright spend on Arizona Dept. of Revenue Payable in July during last year?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(master_txn_table.Amount) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID 
JOIN chart_of_accounts ON master_txn_table.businessID = chart_of_accounts.businessID 
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'Mark Wright' 
AND chart_of_accounts.Account_name = 'Arizona Dept. of Revenue Payable' 
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+7 months','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+7 months','+30 days','-1 day');
gold_sql: select sum(debit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where T1.customers = "Mark Wright" and instr(account,"Arizona Dept. of Revenue Payable") and strftime("%m", transaction_date) = '07' and strftime("%Y", transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', current_date) - 1 and account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense')

question: Compare sales by customer This fiscal year

    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name

GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;

question: Compare sales by customer This year to date
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS sales_this_year, 
    SUM(m.Credit) - LAG(SUM(m.Credit)) OVER (ORDER BY c.customer_name) AS sales_last_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    c.customer_name;
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year') AND date(current_date)  group by customers

question: Compare sales by customer Last fiscal year
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_last_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_current_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months') AND date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months', '+1 years', '-1 days')  group by customers

question: What was the last bill Stacy Mitchell received from Ryan Scott?
generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT mt.transaction_id, mt.amount
FROM master_txn_table mt
JOIN customers c ON mt.Customers = c.customer_name
JOIN vendors v ON mt.Vendor = v.Vendor_name
WHERE c.customer_full_name = 'Stacy Mitchell' AND v.Vendor_name = 'Ryan Scott'

SELECT account, SUM(debit) AS total_debit
FROM master_txn_table
WHERE transaction_date = CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY account
ORDER BY total_debit DESC
LIMIT 1;
gold_sql: select account, sum(debit) from master_txn_table as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name  where account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date) AND date(current_date) group by account order by sum(debit) desc limit 1

question: Number of invoices created for Boat, ship and steamship rental or leasing in Last quarter?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM master_txn_table 
WHERE Transaction_TYPE = 'invoice' 
  AND Product_Service IN ('Boat', 'ship', 'steamship rental or leasing') 
  AND Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-3 months') AND date('now','-1 month');
gold_sql: select count(distinct transaction_id) from master_txn_table where transaction_type = 'invoice' and instr(account,"Boat, ship and steamship rental or leasing") and transaction_date < strftime('%Y-%m-%d', strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') || '-' || substr('00' || (((strftime('%m', 'now') - 1) / 3) * 3 + 4), -2, 2) || '-01')

question: Compare sales by customer in q3 last year
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS sales_amount
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','-3 months') AND date('now','-1 year','-2 months')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    sales_amount DESC;
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+6 month') AND date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+9 month', '-1 day')  group by customers

question: How much did Wendy Ford spend on Loan Payable in July during last year?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(Credit) 
FROM master_txn_table 
WHERE Customers = 'Wendy Ford' 
  AND Account = 'Loan Payable' 
  AND Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+6 month','-1 day') 
                          AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+6 month','+30 days','-1 day');
gold_sql: select sum(debit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where T1.customers = "Wendy Ford" and instr(account,"Loan Payable") and strftime("%m", transaction_date) = '07' and strftime("%Y", transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', current_date) - 1 and account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense')

question: Check the sales receipts record and compute the average quantities ordered with the payment method [payment_method].

FROM master_txn_table

question: Compare sales by customer in dec last year

question: What our monthly spend on Matthew Serrano
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(master_txn_table.Amount) AS Monthly_Spend
FROM master_txn_table
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'Matthew Serrano'
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of month') AND date('now')
GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE);
gold_sql: select date(transaction_date, 'start of month'), sum(debit) from master_txn_table where vendor = "Matthew Serrano" group by date(transaction_date, 'start of month')

question: Compare sales by customer in dec last year
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS sales_amount
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','-1 month','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','-1 month','+30 days')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    sales_amount DESC;
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+11 month') AND date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+12 month', '-1 day')  group by customers

question: How much did Charles Ramirez spend on Job Materials in July during last year?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(master_txn_table.Amount) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID 
JOIN chart_of_accounts ON master_txn_table.businessID = chart_of_accounts.businessID 
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'Charles Ramirez' 
AND chart_of_accounts.Account_name = 'Job Materials' 
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+7 months','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+7 months','+30 days','-1 day');
gold_sql: select sum(debit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where T1.customers = "Charles Ramirez" and instr(account,"Job Materials") and strftime("%m", transaction_date) = '07' and strftime("%Y", transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', current_date) - 1 and account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense')

question: What was the first bill Adam Hernandez received from James Lynn?

question: Compare sales by customer Last fiscal year
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_last_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_current_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months') AND date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months', '+1 years', '-1 days')  group by customers

question: Compare sales by customer This fiscal year to date
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS sales_this_year, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) - LAG(SUM(master_txn_table.Credit)) OVER (ORDER BY strftime('%Y', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE)) AS sales_last_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year', '+3 months') AND date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','+1 year', '+3 months', '-1 day')  group by customers

question: Compare sales by customer Last 7 days
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-7 days') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "-7 days") AND date( current_date)  group by customers

    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_current_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months') AND date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months', '+1 years', '-1 days')  group by customers

question: How many Pool maintenance did we sell to Walter Wyatt Last month?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT master_txn_table.Transaction_ID) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name 
WHERE master_txn_table.Product_Service = 'Pool maintenance' 
AND customers.customer_full_name = 'Walter Wyatt' 
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 month','start of month') AND date('now','-1 month','end of month');
gold_sql: select sum(quantity) from master_txn_table where customers = "Walter Wyatt" and product_service = 'Pool maintenance' and transaction_type in ('invoice', 'sales receipt') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "start of month", "-1 months") AND date( current_date, "start of month", "-1 days")

question: Compare sales by customer Last 30 days
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-30 days') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "-30 days") AND date( current_date)  group by customers

SELECT SUM(master_txn_table.Amount) AS Monthly_Spend
FROM master_txn_table
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'John Stanton'
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of month') AND date('now');
gold_sql: select date(transaction_date, 'start of month'), sum(debit) from master_txn_table where vendor = "John Stanton" group by date(transaction_date, 'start of month')

question: How much did Vicki Johnson spend on Arizona Dept. of Revenue Payable in July during last year?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(Credit) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID 
JOIN chart_of_accounts ON master_txn_table.businessID = chart_of_accounts.businessID 
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'Vicki Johnson' 
AND chart_of_accounts.Account_name = 'Arizona Dept. of Revenue Payable' 
AND Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+6 months','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+6 months','+30 days','-1 day');
gold_sql: select sum(debit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where T1.customers = "Vicki Johnson" and instr(account,"Arizona Dept. of Revenue Payable") and strftime("%m", transaction_date) = '07' and strftime("%Y", transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', current_date) - 1 and account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense')

question: Compare sales by customer Last 12 months
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-12 months') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "-12 months", "start of month") AND date( current_date, 'start of month', '-1 day')  group by customers

question: What was the first bill Jessica Estes received from Scott Lopez?
generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT mt.transaction_id, mt.amount
FROM master_txn_table mt
JOIN customers c ON mt.Customers = c.customer_name
JOIN vendors v ON mt.Vendor = v.Vendor_name
WHERE c.customer_full_name = 'Jessica Estes' AND v.Vendor_name = 'Scott Lopez'
ORDER BY mt.Transaction_DATE ASC
LIMIT 1;
gold_sql: select min(credit) from master_txn_table where customers = "Jessica Estes" and transaction_type = 'bill' and vendor = "Scott Lopez"

question: How much did Annette Alvarado spend on Abandoned infant assistance in July during last year?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name 
JOIN chart_of_accounts ON master_txn_table.Account = chart_of_accounts.Account_name 
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Annette Alvarado' 
AND chart_of_accounts.Account_name = 'Abandoned infant assistance' 
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+6 months','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+6 months','+30 days','-1 day');
gold_sql: select sum(debit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where T1.customers = "Annette Alvarado" and instr(account,"Abandoned infant assistance") and strftime("%m", transaction_date) = '07' and strftime("%Y", transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', current_date) - 1 and account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense')

question: Compare sales by customer Last fiscal year
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_last_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_current_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months') AND date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months', '+1 years', '-1 days')  group by customers

    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-3 months') AND date('now','-1 month')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date < strftime('%Y-%m-%d', strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') || '-' || substr('00' || (((strftime('%m', 'now') - 1) / 3) * 3 + 4), -2, 2) || '-01')  group by customers
